title: Feedback: Joseph Timoney
subtitle: How to Thrive in a Postgrad. Program
body: Details all the ups and downs of the Ph.D journey, providing the best tips advice and thoughts on surviving the Postgraduate Program.

title: Feedback: John G. Keating
subtitle: My Paper Reviews & Recommendations
body: Taking a break from reading Academia, here can be found my latest reads with written reviews, highlights, quotes and recommendations.

title: Feedback: Behnam Faghih
subtitle: Notes and Reflections in Academics
body: Given my life is enveloped in academia, I share my thoughts, experiences and reflections on the academic journey.

title: Feedback: Ralf Bierig
subtitle: Homepage for Everything CS Notes
body: Through my several courses, I have compiled a list of notes, resources and materials from tutorials for students.

title: Feedback: Cian Strolla
subtitle: Online shopping platform
body: An e-commerce website built using MERN stack (MongoDB, Express.js, React, Node.js). Allows users to browse and purchase products.
